criteria.description: Collapsed .triage-io-styled exclusion box (pattern input + Apply + Clear) renders under the site-inventory meta line on the landing page and on the accessibility page
Patterns match the full URL case-insensitively as substring or /regex/; # comments and blank lines ignored
Active list persists in localStorage['vital-exclude:<domain-key>'] (per-domain) and re-applies on load with no re-entry
With a list active, matching findings/pages are hidden and all visible counts update to the filtered view, client-side
Viewer list is additive to the config url_exclude_patterns baseline; banner names both sources with a hidden-count and reset-to-view-all
Export (.json) / Import (.json) / Copy share payload work, carrying the domain key, reusing the triage IO scaffold
matchesExclusionPattern / filterBugsByExclusion honour /regex/ as well as substrings; invalid regex falls back to literal substring; config-baseline behaviour unchanged
Docs updated: CLAUDE.md three-layer note, README/FEATURES bullet, targets.yml cross-reference
Progressive enhancement: JS-off renders the full server report (config baseline applied); the viewer control/filter/IO never break the no-JS baseline
Headline score/grade stays whole-site (not recomputed for the filtered subset); filtered view is labelled
One canonical location per finding preserved; hiding is display filtering only, no re-render elsewhere
Sustainable web output: reuse .triage-io/existing CSS, no web fonts, gated no-op-when-empty script, within the lean budget
No data/state/API changes; deep links and #fragment anchors keep working; JSON API keyed on domain/week untouched
No new npm runtime dependencies; Node ESM >= 20, no build step
Severity taxonomy unchanged (internal keys critical/serious/moderate/minor; four display labels)
i18n lockstep: new visible strings via t(); script templates injected per-locale via JSON.stringify(t()); i18n:check green
Unit tests cover regex-aware filter (substring/regex/invalid fallback) and control+banner render/inert-when-empty; e2e/i18n hrefs updated in lockstep
Net added CSS/JS within budget; reuses .triage-io + existing IO script; filter script emitted once per page and a no-op when no list stored
